title: World Aids Day celebrated
description: GARDEN ROUTE NEWS - World Aids Day, which is...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"GARDEN ROUTE NEWS - World Aids Day, which is held annually on 1 December, brings together people from around the world to raise awareness about HIV/Aids and demonstrate international solidarity in the face of the pandemic.","html":"GARDEN ROUTE NEWS - World Aids Day, which is held annually on 1 December, brings together people from around the world to raise awareness about HIV/Aids and demonstrate international solidarity in the face of the pandemic."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"As part of SWD Cricket's corporate social investment projects, members of the staff and other community stakeholders reached out to the Toekomsrust Clinic in Oudtshoorn."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Various children who are impacted by the pandemic were spoiled, as the donors adopted a child or children to spoil with Christmas presents.","html":"Various children who are impacted by the pandemic were spoiled, as the donors adopted a child or children to spoil with Christmas presents."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Zenobia Nel of SWD Cricket, who co-ordinated the event, expressed a word of thanks and appreciation for the opportunity to be involved in the project, and to nursing staff at the Toekomsrust Clinic for their devotion.","html":"Zenobia Nel of SWD Cricket, who co-ordinated the event, expressed a word of thanks and appreciation for the opportunity to be involved in the project, and to nursing staff at the Toekomsrust Clinic for their devotion."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
